case_title: MITCHELL, ANTWOINE et al vs. CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MANNING, DANIEL $12,293.02 PRINCIPAL, $2,556.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $14,849.32, JUDGMENT DTD 2/24/97 ORDERED SET ASIDE AND VACATED. DEFTS TO PAY JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY TO PLTF ANTWOINE MITCHELL THE SUM OF $5,428.76; AND TO PLTF ROBERT HARRIS THE SUM OF $6,864.24 PLTFS TO RECOVER COSTS IN THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF $2,556.30 PER COST BILL. SEE AMENDED JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, MOTION FOR NEW TRIAL, CALENDAR OF APR-10-1997 DEFENDANTS' MOTION FOR NEW TRIAL IS GRANTED; PROVIDED, HOWEV ER, THAT IF THE PARTIES AGREE TO AN AWARD OF NON-ECONOMIC DA MAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $5,000 AS TO MR. MITCHELL AND $9,000 AS TO MR. HARRIS, THE MOTION IS DENIED. THE JUDGMENT ENTERED ON FEBRUARY 24, 1997 IS HEREBY SET ASIDE AND VACATED.
